entry.title: IDC V797P6019B (P00097) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: "Orders of $50,000 or less for upgrades and accessories may be placed directly to the contractor by any Federal agency. Orders for complete systems, and any order exceeding $50,000 can only be placed by the VA National Acquisition Center."

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED TO INCORPORATE GE S UPDATED PRICELIST FOR ALL MODALITIES. THERE ARE TWO NEW SYSTEMS BEING ADDED CT REVOLUTION AND IGS 740 SYSTEMS.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC V797P6019B (P00098) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: "Orders of $50,000 or less for upgrades and accessories may be placed directly to the contractor by any Federal agency. Orders for complete systems, and any order exceeding $50,000 can only be placed by the VA National Acquisition Center."

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED TO INCORPORATE THE FOLLOWING: 1. UPDATE DISCOUNT TABLE FOR DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING, ULTRASOUND AND BMD. 2. UPDATE DISCOUNT TABLE FOR MAINTENANCE SERVICE. 3. UPDATE GE'S DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING PRICELIST AND ADD ADDITIONAL CATALOG ITEMS.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC V797P6019B (P00099) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: "Orders of $50,000 or less for upgrades and accessories may be placed directly to the contractor by any Federal agency. Orders for complete systems, and any order exceeding $50,000 can only be placed by the VA National Acquisition Center."

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED TO INCORPORATE: 1. UPDATE DISCOUNT TABLE FOR ULTRASOUND AND BMD. THESE DISCOUNTS WILL SUPERSEDE ANY PREVIOUS DISCOUNTS. 2. UPDATE GE'S ULTRASOUND AND BMD PRICLIST, ADD ADDITIONAL CATALOG ITEMS AND ADD NEW SYSTEM VOLUSON E10. 3. THERE ARE NO OTHER CHANGES TO THE CONTRACT TERMS AND CONDITIONS. SEE ATTACHED .XLSM SPREADSHEETS: COMBINED CONTRACT DISCOUNTS -UPDATED GOVERNMENT DISCOUNTS ULTRASOUND&BMD 10-16-2014 .XLSX ULTRASOUND&BMD CONTRACT PRICEBOOK 10-8-2014.XLSX

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC V797P6019B (P00100) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: "Orders of $50,000 or less for upgrades and accessories may be placed directly to the contractor by any Federal agency. Orders for complete systems, and any order exceeding $50,000 can only be placed by the VA National Acquisition Center."

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE THE GOVERNMENT S UNILATERAL RIGHT TO EXERCISE THE NEXT OPTION PERIOD IN ACCORDANCE WITH CLAUSE 52.217-9, OPTION TO EXTEND THE TERM OF THE CONTRACT AND TO INCORPORATE AN UPWARD ADJUSTMENT OF CONTRACT LIST PRICE LIMITED TO AN AMOUNT NOT GREATER THAN 4%.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC V797P6019B (P00101) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: "Orders of $50,000 or less for upgrades and accessories may be placed directly to the contractor by any Federal agency. Orders for complete systems, and any order exceeding $50,000 can only be placed by the VA National Acquisition Center."

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION:
A. ADD GE CONTRACT ADDITIONS FOR ULTRASOUND&BMD EQUIPMENT. SEE ATTACHED SPREADSHEET ULTRASOUND&BMD CONTRACT PRICEBOOK 1-6-2015.XLS B. ALL CONTRACT TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT INCLUDING APPLICABLE DISCOUNTS APPLY. C. THERE ARE NO OTHER CHANGES TO THE CONTRACT TERMS AND CONDITIONS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: "Orders of $50,000 or less for upgrades and accessories may be placed directly to the contractor by any Federal agency. Orders for complete systems, and any order exceeding $50,000 can only be placed by the VA National Acquisition Center."

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS HEREBY ISSUED TO INCORPORATE THE ATTACHED SMALL BUSINESS SUBCONTRACTING PLAN INTO THE CONTRACT REFERENCED IN BLOCK 10A. 2. ALL CONTRACT TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT INCLUDING APPLICABLE DISCOUNTS APPLY. 1. THE EFFECTIVE PERFORMANCE PERIOD OF THE PLAN SHALL BE FROM JANUARY 1, 2015 THRU DECEMBER 31, 2015.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

entry.title: IDC V797P6019B (P00103) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: "Orders of $50,000 or less for upgrades and accessories may be placed directly to the contractor by any Federal agency. Orders for complete systems, and any order exceeding $50,000 can only be placed by the VA National Acquisition Center."

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION: 1. UPDATE PRICELIST AND DISCOUNTS FOR GE S DIAGNOSTIC IMAGING PRODUCTS, TO INCLUDE ADDING TWO NEW SYSTEMS. THE XR656+ IS A NEWER VERSION OF THE CURRENT XR656 AND THE SIGNA PET/MR SYSTEM. SEE ATTACHED 2-13-2015 US GOVT PRICE LIST V3 TPH.XLSX 2. UPDATE PRICELIST FOR GE S ULTRASOUND AND BMD PRODUCTS, TO INCLUDE PART NUMBER CHANGES. SEE ATTACHED ULTRASOUND&BMD CONTRACT PRICE BOOK 2-5-2015.XLSX 3. ALL CONTRACT TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT INCLUDING APPLICABLE DISCOUNTS APPLY. 4. THERE ARE NO OTHER CHANGES TO THE CONTRACT TERMS AND CONDITIONS.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
